Question: Find the partial fraction decomposition of the following expression. $$\frac{x}{( x -3 ) ( x -2 )}$$
Find the partial fraction decomposition of the expression with repeated linear factors. $$\frac{6 x -11}{( x -1 )^{2}}$$
Find the partial fraction decomposition of the expression with a nonrepeating irreducible quadratic factor. $$\frac{5 x^{2} -6 x + 7}{( x -1 ) ( x^{2} + 1 )}$$
Find the partial fraction decomposition of the expression with a repeated irreducible quadratic factor. $$\frac{x^{3} -4 x^{2} + 9 x -5}{( x^{2} -2 x + 3 )^{2}}$$
